channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: What to know before Cal kicks off against No. 9 SMU
item.description: SMU won the only previous meeting, beating a one-win Cal team 13-7 at Berkeley on Sept. 21, 1957. A year later, the Bears played in their most recent Rose Bowl game.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Faraudo, The Mercury News

item.title: Georgia pulls out epic win in 8-overtime thriller, all but clinch spot in College Football Playoff
item.description: Georgia overcame a 14-point deficit with 5:37 left and defeated Georgia Tech in eight overtimes to all but clinch a spot in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 6 Georgia rallies to beat Georgia Tech 44-42 in eighth overtime, bolsters playoff hopes
item.description: Nate Frazier ran for a 2-point conversion in the eighth overtime of a marathon for the ages after No. 6 Georgia pulled off an improbable fourth-quarter comeback, giving the Bulldogs a 44-42 victory over Georgia Tech.
item.dc:creator: Paul Newberry, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Colorado coach Deion Sanders says Shedeur Sanders, Travis Hunter, other stars 'going to play' in bowl game
item.description: The Colorado football team does not plan on falling in line with the trend of key players sitting out a bowl game, even if that game is not part of the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Colorado State advances to MW volleyball final and will take the court against San Jose State
item.description: Colorado State coach Emily Kohan said her team will take the floor against San Jose State in the Mountain West volleyball championship rather than become the latest team to forfeit to the Spartans.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Chiefs recover botched snap by Raiders in closing seconds, clinch playoff berth with 19-17 victory
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs recovered a botched snap while the Las Vegas Raiders were within range of a go-ahead field goal with 15 seconds remaining, preserving a 19-17 victory for Kansas City.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Embattled Lions receiver Jameson Williams apologized to team after costly penalty, coach says
item.description: Detroit Lions head coach Dan Campbell said wide receiver Jameson Williams apologized to his teammates postgame after taking a costly penalty late.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: F1 focus shifts in Qatar as McLaren, Ferrari and Red Bull fight for constructors' title
item.description: LUSAIL, Qatar (AP) — Max Verstappen won big in Las Vegas with his fourth world title, but the fight for Formula 1's biggest cash prize is hotting up this week in Qatar. The lucrative constructors' championship is still wide open with McLaren, Ferrari and Red Bull battling for the title.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH1, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Taylor Swift spends Black Friday amid sea of red as boyfriend Travis Kelce's Chiefs face the Raiders
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Pop superstar Taylor Swift was spending Black Friday amid a sea of red to watch her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the rest of the Kansas City Chiefs as they played the Las Vegas Raiders in a chilly matinee at Arrowhead Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs lineman Tershawn Wharton catches young fan after falling over barrier at Panthers' stadium
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs defensive lineman Tershawn Wharton reacted quickly after Sunday's game against the Panthers when he appeared to catch a young fan that fell over a barrier at the stadium.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Desrosiers scores 3 TDs as Memphis tops No. 18 Tulane 34-24 to end the Green Wave's faint CFP hopes
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — When three deep passes by Darian Mensah resulted in turnovers, Tulane's long-shot hopes of sneaking into the College Football Playoff slipped away. Greg Desrosiers Jr. caught two scoring passes and ran for a touchdown, and Memphis defeated No.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Overshown's flashy pick-6 boosts Cowboys in 27-20 Thanksgiving win over Giants
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — DeMarvion Overshown wasn't sure he could run down the pass he tipped and turn it into an interception for a touchdown.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers QB Brock Purdy remains severely limited by injury to his throwing shoulder
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Brock Purdy threw one short pass in the open portion of practice for the San Francisco 49ers as he remains slowed by an injury to his throwing shoulder that has already forced him to miss a game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Jon Batiste, Ledisi, Trombone Shorty and Lauren Daigle to perform during Super Bowl pregame
item.description: The Super Bowl pregame will have some Louisiana flavor: Multi-talented performer Jon Batiste will hit the stage to sing the national anthem, while Trombone Shorty and Lauren Daigle are slated to perform “America the Beautiful.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Depleted Jazz lose to Denver, 122-103
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Without injured stars Lauri Markkanen, John Collins and Jordan Clarkson, the Utah Jazz had little chance against the Denver Nuggets and lost for the sixth time in their last seven games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles area grad on life support after suffering head injury in college football game
item.description: A graduate of a Los Angeles County high school is on life support after suffering a serious head injury during a college football game last month. His school had mistakenly announced he had died Tuesday. According to KTLA affiliate WHNT in Huntsville, Alabama, 20-year-old Medrick Burnett Jr.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Chicago hosts Dallas in Central Division play
item.description: Dallas Stars (13-7, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (7-12-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Wednesday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Dallas Stars visit the Chicago Blackhawks in a matchup within the Central Division Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SEC fines University of Oklahoma $200,000 after fans rush onto field
item.description: The University of Oklahoma was fined $200,000 after the fans rushed the field during Saturday's game against Alabama.
item.dc:creator: Dylan Brown / KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Whittingham uncertain about future at Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This has been the most disappointing and most frustrating season in Kyle Whittingham's 20 years as head coach of the Utah football team. But will Whittingham be back for a 21st season? He has a decision to make in the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU needs some help to reach Big 12 Championship Game
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a 9-0 start, it appeared as though BYU was destined for the Big 12 Championship Game. But now, they need some help.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Family mourns death of 27-year-old woman in Harvey train crash
item.description: A 27-year-old woman was killed in a car versus train crash in Harvey, IL, leaving behind a family grieving for her loss.
item.dc:creator: Andrea Medina, WGN 9

item.title: Formula 1 expands grid to add General Motors' Cadillac brand and new American team for 2026 season
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Formula 1 on Monday at last said it will expand its grid in 2026 to make room for an American team that is partnered with General Motors. “As the pinnacle of motorsports, F1 demands boundary-pushing innovation and excellence.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New stadium, new look: Salt Lake Bees unveil 2025 logos, uniforms
item.description: It's a whole new era for the Salt Lake Bees as they prepare for their move to South Jordan where they will play in their brand new home of Daybreak Field.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Buccaneers QB Baker Mayfield seeks $12M in lawsuit against his father's company
item.description: An ongoing dispute between Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield and his family in Austin has boiled over into a lawsuit.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, WGN 9

item.title: Seibert misses an extra point late as the Commanders lose their 3rd in a row, 34-26 to the Cowboys
item.description: Austin Seibert choked back tears taking responsibility for missing the extra point that would have tied the score in the final minute. Jeremy Reaves choked back tears blaming himself for a missed assignment that led to a kickoff return touchdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU sweeps men's and women's cross-country national titles
item.description: WACO, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU became just the fifth school ever to win national titles in both men's and women's cross-country. The #1 ranked women's team won its sixth in program history, with a team score of 147 at the Zimmer Championship Course Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
